/usr/bin/c++  -rdynamic -g -O3 -Wall -Wextra -Werror -pthread -Wno-unused-function -Wno-deprecated -Wno-unused-parameter CMakeFiles/config.dir/test/testconfig.cc.o -o /home/lunisolar/cpp/mysylar/bin/config  -Wl,-rpath,/home/lunisolar/cpp/mysylar/lib /home/lunisolar/cpp/mysylar/lib/libsylar.so /usr/local/lib/libyaml-cpp.a
